name: discord-bot-control-center
description: Enterprise-grade Discord Bot Control Center with real-time telemetry, monitoring, and management

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build && cp -r client/.next .next
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
